title: BEM-946 push retry fix
objective:
Run script:
"""
def write_file(path, text):
    p=Path(path)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))

# Record the real failure observed by operator screenshots.
write_file('governance/reports/BEM946_PUSH_FAILURE_DIAGNOSIS.md', '''# BEM-946 | Git push failure diagnosis
Status: PUSH_FAILURE_CONFIRMED
Date: 2026-05-31

Observed from GitHub Actions screenshot:
- Workflow: Codex Runner v3
- Job summary showed local status completed and local SHA.
- Actual job failed on push step with: failed to push some refs / fetch first.
- Cause: remote main changed while runner was committing local result. Local commit SHA is not sufficient proof if push failed.

Decision:
- Treat affected run as not release proof.
- Stabilize codex-runner push path with pull --rebase and retry push.
- Add push conflict evidence policy.

No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/state/push_conflict_policy.json', '''{
  "version": "1.0",
  "date": "2026-05-31",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "problem": "GitHub Actions runner may commit locally but fail to push when remote main changed concurrently.",
  "rules": [
    {"id":"local_sha_not_release_proof", "severity":"critical", "rule":"Local commit SHA is not release proof until pushed or verified on remote."},
    {"id":"push_retry_required", "severity":"critical", "rule":"Runner must retry push after fetch/rebase on non-fast-forward rejection."},
    {"id":"workflow_failure_overrides_completed_summary", "severity":"critical", "rule":"If GitHub job status is failed, runner summary status=completed is not accepted as PASS."},
    {"id":"remote_sha_verification_required", "severity":"high", "rule":"After push, proof must verify remote HEAD or record that verification is pending."}
  ],
  "recommended_push_algorithm": [
    "git fetch origin main",
    "git pull --rebase origin main or git rebase origin/main",
    "git push origin HEAD:main",
    "retry up to 3 times on non-fast-forward"
  ]
}
''')

# Add a helper script that workflows can call for safe push. This avoids editing workflow blindly if its exact layout differs.
write_file('governance/runners/git_push_with_retry.sh', '''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

BRANCH="${1:-main}"
REMOTE="${2:-origin}"
MAX_ATTEMPTS="${MAX_PUSH_ATTEMPTS:-3}"

echo "BEM-946 safe push: remote=${REMOTE} branch=${BRANCH} attempts=${MAX_ATTEMPTS}"

for attempt in $(seq 1 "$MAX_ATTEMPTS"); do
  echo "BEM-946 safe push attempt ${attempt}/${MAX_ATTEMPTS}"
  git fetch "$REMOTE" "$BRANCH"
  if git rev-parse --verify "${REMOTE}/${BRANCH}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    git rebase "${REMOTE}/${BRANCH}" || {
      echo "Rebase failed; aborting rebase and failing safely"
      git rebase --abort || true
      exit 1
    }
  fi
  if git push "$REMOTE" "HEAD:${BRANCH}"; then
    echo "BEM-946 safe push PASS"
    git rev-parse HEAD > governance/codex/last_pushed_sha.txt || true
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "Push rejected; retrying after remote sync"
  sleep $((attempt * 2))
done

echo "BEM-946 safe push FAIL after ${MAX_ATTEMPTS} attempts"
exit 1
''')

# Try to patch codex-runner workflow if present.
wf=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
if wf.exists():
    text=wf.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')
    original=text
    # Conservative patch: replace simple git push origin HEAD:main or git push with helper call when exact patterns exist.
    text=text.replace('git push origin HEAD:main', 'bash governance/runners/git_push_with_retry.sh main origin')
    text=text.replace('git push origin main', 'bash governance/runners/git_push_with_retry.sh main origin')
    # If workflow used plain git push, keep only if not already patched.
    text=text.replace('\n          git push\n', '\n          bash governance/runners/git_push_with_retry.sh main origin\n')
    if text!=original:
        wf.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(wf))
        patch_status='workflow_patched'
    else:
        patch_status='workflow_not_matched_helper_added'
else:
    patch_status='workflow_missing_helper_added'

write_file('governance/reports/BEM946_PUSH_STABILIZATION_PASS.md', f'''# BEM-946 | Push stabilization
Status: PUSH_STABILIZATION_FOUNDATION_PASS
Date: 2026-05-31
Workflow patch status: {patch_status}

Created artifacts:
- governance/reports/BEM946_PUSH_FAILURE_DIAGNOSIS.md
- governance/state/push_conflict_policy.json
- governance/runners/git_push_with_retry.sh
- .github/workflows/codex-runner.yml if matching push command was found

Important:
- This fixes the class of failure shown in the operator screenshot.
- Any previous failed GitHub run remains failed.
- Foundation roadmap results need re-verification after a successful pushed run.
- Release PASS remains forbidden until remote/non-null SHA proof is verified.

No issue comments.
''')

ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
ctx.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
append='''\n\n## BEM-946 in progress/completed | 2026-05-31\nOperator provided GitHub Actions screenshots showing Codex Runner failed after local completed summary because git push was rejected: remote main had work not present locally.\nDecision: workflow failure overrides local completed summary. Local SHA is not release proof if push failed.\nImplemented push conflict policy and safe push helper with fetch/rebase/retry.\nCreated BEM946_PUSH_FAILURE_DIAGNOSIS, push_conflict_policy and git_push_with_retry helper.\nNext: verify BEM-946 task result and then re-run/fix final proof if needed.\nNo issue comments.\n'''
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')+append, encoding='utf-8')
else:
    ctx.write_text('# AGENT_CONTEXT\n'+append, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(ctx))
ops_applied.append('BEM-946 push stabilization artifacts created')
"""
No issue comments.
